englishDefinitions: Short form of Creedence Clearwater Revival, an American rock band famous in the late 1960s and early 1970s.
A cultural reference to the band's music, style, or era.
persianTranslation: اشاره به گروه راک آمریکایی Creedence Clearwater Revival
examples: We listened to Creedence Clearwater on the drive to the lake.
That song has the unmistakable sound of Creedence Clearwater.
He grew up hearing Creedence Clearwater at family gatherings.
